title: Login page throws 500 error
description: Users report a server error when submitting valid credentials on the login page.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Reset email is delayed or never delivered for some domains.

title: Dashboard loading slowly
description: Main dashboard takes more than 12 seconds to render after login.

title: Export to CSV missing columns
description: Downloaded CSV excludes custom fields selected in report settings.

title: Mobile app crashes on startup
description: iOS app crashes immediately after splash screen on version 5.2.1.

title: Billing invoice PDF corrupted
description: Generated invoice PDFs cannot be opened in Adobe Reader.

title: Two-factor authentication code invalid
description: Users receive 'invalid code' despite entering OTP within 30 seconds.

title: Notification settings not saving
description: Changes to email and SMS preferences revert after page refresh.

title: Search returns duplicate results
description: Global search displays repeated records for the same item.

title: API rate limit headers missing
description: Response headers do not include remaining quota and reset time values.

title: File upload fails for >25MB
description: Uploads over 25MB fail with timeout despite documented 50MB limit.

title: Role permissions not applied
description: Newly assigned manager role cannot access team analytics page.
